html:
Exclusive to:

The Treeguard Idol is a unique item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Woodie with the Treeguard Feller III Skill, in his Survivor Filter or in the Magic Filter. It requires 3 Cut Grass, 2 Living Logs, and 5 Nightmare Fuel to craft.

The Idol can be used as fuel with the same efficiency as Boards, adding 180 seconds to a Campfire and 360 seconds to a Fire Pit.

When burnt in a Campfire or on the ground, the Treeguard Idol transforms nearby Evergreens and Lumpy Evergreens of any size into Treeguards of their respective type, or medium (not large or small) Birchnut Trees into Poison Birchnut Trees, similarly to spawning Treeguards when chopping Trees regularly.

Each Treeguard Idol burnt results in 2 Treeguards. They can be stacked up to 10 and burnt in a stack to spawn more Treeguards at once.

Trivia

  • The Treeguard Idol was added in the Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie Update.

“Carving a tree out of wood seems a bit redundant.”
–Wilson

“Let's play "funeral pyre."”

–WX-78
“I believe it requires the application of a flame.”

“To fight a tree, you gotta think like a tree...”
–Woodie
“How very folksy.”

“Tribute tö an ancient wöodland being.”
–Wigfrid
“Aww, it's a little angry tree!”
–Webber
“Sometimes it's difficult to say whether he loves or hates trees.”
–Warly
“Friend...?”
–Wormwood
“That's some quality carving, there.”
–Winona
“A nice carving, but the pose is a little wooden, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Aww, little Treebeast!”
–Wurt
“What a neat way to start a campfire!”
–Walter
“What a funny little trinket!”
–Wanda
The Treeguard Idol is a unique item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Woodie with the Treeguard Feller III Skill, in his Survivor Filter or in the Magic Filter. It requires 3 Cut Grass, 2 Living Logs, and 5 Nightmare Fuel to craft.
The Idol can be used as fuel with the same efficiency as Boards, adding 180 seconds to a Campfire and 360 seconds to a Fire Pit.
When burnt in a Campfire or on the ground, the Treeguard Idol transforms nearby Evergreens and Lumpy Evergreens of any size into Treeguards of their respective type, or medium (not large or small) Birchnut Trees into Poison Birchnut Trees, similarly to spawning Treeguards when chopping Trees regularly.
Each Treeguard Idol burnt results in 2 Treeguards. They can be stacked up to 10 and burnt in a stack to spawn more Treeguards at once.

The Treeguard Idol was added in the Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie Update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thần Rừng Thần Rừng là một vật phẩm độc nhất dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together. Nó chỉ có thể được chế tạo bởi Woodie bằng Kỹ năng Treeguard Feller III, trong Bộ lọc sống sót hoặc trong Bộ lọc ma thuật. Nó cần 3 Cỏ Cắt, 2 Gỗ Sống và 5 Nhiên Liệu Ác Mộng để chế tạo.

The '''Treeguard Idol''' is a unique item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can only be crafted by [[Woodie]] with the {{PicDark|24|Treeguard Feller III}} ''[[Woodie/Don't Starve Together#Treeguard Feller|Treeguard Feller III]]'' Skill, in his [[Survivor_Items_Filter#Woodie|Survivor Filter]] or in the [[Magic Filter]]. It requires 3 [[Cut Grass]], 2 [[Living Logs]], and 5 [[Nightmare Fuel]] to craft.

The Idol can be used as fuel with the same efficiency as [[Boards]], adding 180 seconds to a [[Campfire]] and 360 seconds to a [[Fire Pit]].

When burnt in a Campfire or on the ground, the Treeguard Idol transforms nearby [[Evergreen]]s and [[Lumpy Evergreen]]s of any size into [[Treeguard|Treeguards]] of their respective type, or ''medium'' (not large or small) [[Birchnut Tree]]s into [[Poison Birchnut Tree]]s, similarly to spawning Treeguards when chopping Trees regularly.

Each Treeguard Idol burnt results in 2 Treeguards. They can be stacked up to 10 and burnt in a stack to spawn more Treeguards at once.

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Treeguard Idol was added in the ''[[Skill_Spotlight_Update#Wormwood,_Wolfgang,_Woodie|Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie]]'' Update.
